description: Kochav Defense Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses in defense and aerospace industries. The company was incorporated in 2025 and is based in New York, New York.
